prompt: Epic action macro photograph on a forest twig. A tiny {argument name="character" default="armored warrior"} with the uploaded face as reference rides a large realistic {argument name="insect" default="black ant"} like a warhorse. The rider wears detailed fantasy armor, posed dynamically as if charging into battle, holding reins made from {argument name="material" default="spider silk"} wrapped around the ant’s head. The ant’s exoskeleton is ultra-shiny, highly detailed, and textured, with sharp legs gripping the twig. Cinematic macro lighting, shallow depth of field. Background is a soft green leafy bokeh with natural forest tones. Hyper-realistic insect photography style, ultra detail, crisp focus on the ant and rider, dramatic action mood.
translatedPrompt: 森林树枝上的史诗级动作微距摄影。一位微小的 {argument name="character" default="身披铠甲的战士"}（以上传的人脸为参考）像骑战马一样骑着一只巨大的、写实的 {argument name="insect" default="黑蚂蚁"}。骑手身穿精致的奇幻铠甲，姿态动态十足，仿佛正冲向战场，手中握着由 {argument name="material" default="蛛丝"} 制成的缰绳，缠绕在蚂蚁头部。蚂蚁的外骨骼超亮、细节丰富且质感十足，锋利的足部紧紧抓在树枝上。电影级微距灯光，浅景深。背景是柔和的绿色叶片虚化效果，带有自然的森林色调。超写实昆虫摄影风格，极致细节，蚂蚁和骑手焦点清晰，充满戏剧性的动作氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 蚂蚁战士微距摄影：一个富有创意的微距摄影提示词，描绘了一位微小的战士骑着一只细节丰富、闪闪发光的黑色蚂蚁在森林树枝上的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
